titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 76: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 76. (A.R. No. 248 of 1937.) TIMMICHCHŪR, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a boulder known as Taḍaṅgal near the Śiva temple.

p.hi: Parakēsarivarman, who took the head of Pāṇḍya (Āditya II) Year 5: 965 A.D.

summary.p: Seems to record the gift of two plots of land as ambalappaṭṭi by Munmuḍi chōḻa Kāḍupaṭṭi of Timiśūr in Timiśūr-nāḍu for cleaning and also for providing firewood to the firehearth (tīppātti) in the hall constructed by himself. He also donated sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the same hall. The inscription further records that he also constructed a shrine for Piḍāriyār and consecrated the goddess, images there.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pāṇṭiyaṉ ṟalai koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu
timicūrnāṭṭut timicūr mummuṭi ṭu paṭṭiHis full name is given as mummuṭiccoḻak kāṭupaṭṭi in line no. 8. Hence this may be restored to mummuṭic coḻakkāṭupaṭṭiyeṭuppitta Ampa
lam tikaiāyirattaiññūṟṟuvakke ṅkaṉum paṉaiyātūruṭaiyā
nerik kiḻeripThe letter pa resembles mapaṭṭiyum ceṅkuḷattu ṭa kaṟṟūm poreḻacciyumerippa
ṭṭiyum Ampalattukkut tūrukkavumeḻakavu n=tippāttikku viṟakiṭavum ceyta Ampala
ppaṭṭiyum Ampalattukku nantāviḷakkukku vaitta Āṭum Ivai kāppāṉaṭi yeṉṟalai me
laṉa Ivai māṟṟuvāneḻā narakattuk kiḻānarakattu niṟppāṉ Aṟamaṟa vaṟkka Aṟamallatu tuṇaiyillai
mummuṭic coḻak kāṭupaṭṭikaḷe yeṭuppitta piṭāri
koyilum piṭārikaḷaiyuñ ceyvittār .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
